query:
SELECT s.id, s.username, s.planId, s.status,
p.name as plan_name, p.downloadSpeed, p.uploadSpeed
FROM subscribers s
LEFT JOIN plans p ON s.planId = p.id
WHERE s.createdBy = 17
ORDER BY s.id DESC
LIMIT 1;
